sentences.arabic: يُعَدُّ الْكُسْكُسِيُّ الطَّبَقَ الْوَطَنِيَّ الْأَوَّلَ فِي بِلَادِ الْمَغْرِبِ الْعَرَبِيِّ، وَهُوَ رَمْزٌ لِلِاجْتِمَاعِ الْعَائِلِيِّ يَوْمَ الْجُمُعَةِ.
sentences.translation: Kuskus se smatra prvim nacionalnim jelom u zemljama Magreba i on je simbol porodičnog okupljanja petkom.
sentences.translationEn: Couscous is considered the primary national dish in the Maghreb countries, and it is a symbol of family gatherings on Fridays.

sentences.arabic: يَتَطَلَّبُ تَحْضِيرُهُ مَهَارَةً عَالِيَةً، حَيْثُ يُطْهَى السَّمِيدُ عَلَى الْبُخَارِ حَتَّى يَنْضَجَ وَيُصْبِحَ خَفِيفًا وَهَشًّا.
sentences.translation: Njegova priprema zahtijeva veliku vještinu, jer se griz kuha na pari dok ne omekša i postane lagan i rastresit.
sentences.translationEn: Its preparation requires high skill, as the semolina is steamed until it cooks and becomes light and fluffy.

sentences.arabic: يُقَدَّمُ الْكُسْكُسِيُّ عَادَةً مَعَ مَرَقِ اللَّحْمِ أَوِ الدَّجَاجِ وَمَجْمُوعَةٍ مُتَنَوُّعَةٍ مِنَ الْخُضَارِ الْمَوْسِمِيَّةِ الطَّازَجَةِ.
sentences.translation: Kuskus se obično poslužuje s mesnim ili pilećim temeljcem i raznim svježim sezonskim povrćem.
sentences.translationEn: Couscous is usually served with meat or chicken broth and a variety of fresh seasonal vegetables.

sentences.arabic: تُضِيفُ بَعْضُ الْمَنَاطِقِ لَمَسَاتٍ خَاصَّةً مِثْلَ "التَّفَايَةِ" الْمُكَوَّنَةِ مِنَ الْبَصَلِ وَالزَّبِيبِ الْمُعَسَّلِ لِإِعْطَاءِ نَكْهَةٍ حُلْوَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Neke regije dodaju posebne dodire poput 'tfaya-e', koja se sastoji od luka i karameliziranih grožđica, kako bi se dobio slatkast ukus.
sentences.translationEn: Some regions add special touches like 'tfaya', consisting of onions and caramelized raisins, to give a sweet flavor.

sentences.arabic: يَجْتَمِعُ أَفْرَادُ الْعَائِلَةِ حَوْلَ طَبَقٍ وَاحِدٍ كَبِيرٍ، مِمَّا يُجَسِّدُ قِيَمَ التَّكَافُلِ وَالْمَحَبَّةِ فِي الثَّقَافَةِ الْمَغَارِبِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Članovi porodice okupljaju se oko jednog velikog tanjira, što utjelovljuje vrijednosti solidarnosti i ljubavi u magrebškoj kulturi.
sentences.translationEn: Family members gather around one large plate, embodying the values of solidarity and love in Maghrebi culture.
